sections.heading: Link： ESP32-P4-WIFI6
sections.text: Link： ESP32-P4-WIFI6 Description ESP32-P4-WIFI6 4.3inch Rounded Corner LCD Development Board Based on ESP32-P4 and ESP32-C6 High-Performance Development Board Integrated audio input/output module for AI interaction and voice control The display orientation is portrait by default, 480 × 800 resolution (H × V). Change the software config for landscape display. Version Options ESP32-P4-WIFI6-Touch-LCD-4.3 Standard version, without camera Features The ESP32-P4-WIFI6-Touch-LCD-4.3 is a high-performance development board based on ESP32-P4 controller with RISC-V 32-bit dual-core and single-core processors.
